Ready to plan

Ask the Contre-Maitre to inspect the repo, reason through options, and answer without dispatching work.

Enter Start session
Shift+Enter New line
Agents
·
Spinning up
0:00
›
~/
no branch · ~/
deepseek · deepseek-v4-flash
Settings
Agents
Unsaved changes
Connection
Stored locally in the app config.
Models
Plan mode, directives, backlog planning, and reviews.
Code-writing implementer passes.
Roster
Build mode uses these CMs for planning and review. Plan mode always uses one CM.
Number of implementer profiles available for ticket assignment.
Timeout for each model call.
Generation
Upper limit for each model response. DeepSeek V4 allows up to 384K.
Override temperature
Off uses the provider's default temperature for the selected model.
PreciseCreative
Build completion
Enable Finalizer agent
Runs tests and validates the build at the end of every session.
Repository
Auto-create branch
Creates a codedone/work-* branch when a build session starts.
Require clean working tree
Block session start if there are uncommitted changes.
Auto-stage & commit
Stages and commits all build changes at session end. Disable to leave changes uncommitted.
Configuration
Leave blank to use git from PATH.
Appearance
Output
Show timestamps
Display time next to each agent message.
Auto-scroll
Follow output as it arrives.
Ctrl+, to open  ·  Esc to close
Contre-Maître · Clarification needed

A few questions before planning continues

⌘↵ submit  ·  Esc later
Backlog
No backlog yet
